required_operator_inputs: land mirror_repeat as the next runtime-real Shape row after the checkpointed posterize slice
reuse the existing repeat frequency/phase owners instead of inventing a new mirror_repeat parameter pack
keep the extracted descriptor/core architecture as the authority for shape ids and semantics
preserve existing identity, offset_scale, repeat, and posterize behavior while widening mirror_repeat
forbidden_operator_prompts: ship mirror_repeat as descriptor-only or draft-only after claiming the slice landed
add new dedicated mirror_repeat owner fields when the existing repeat frequency/phase pack already matches the row semantics
widen bias_gain_curve or smooth_window in the same slice
break the existing runtime-backed Shape rows while landing mirror_repeat

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The advanced color library foundation Phase 3 mirror_repeat contract validates successfully
The advanced color library foundation phased plan stays synchronized during the mirror_repeat slice
